economic_notes: Fishing Lake First Nation Ventures Limited Partnership (99.99% owned), Fishing Lake First Nation Ventures Ltd. (100% owned), and Fishing Lake Store Inc. (100% owned) are accounted for on a modified equity basis as government business enterprises. Fishing Lake Indian Child and Family Services Inc. is a fully consolidated subsidiary. New school construction project underway. 1907 Surrender Trust funds land acquisitions for community benefit.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but audit was signed May 4, 2022 - over a year delay. Financial statements include a restatement of 2020 comparative figures. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: FLFN Ventures LP, FLFN Ventures Ltd., and Fishing Lake Store Inc. One fully consolidated subsidiary: Fishing Lake Indian Child and Family Services Inc. The 1907 Surrender Trust is excluded from consolidation as it is governed by independent trustees. Large capital additions in prior year ($20.1M) related to new school construction which drove the large prior year surplus. Deferred revenue includes school capital construction, per capita distribution, and Surrender Trust allocations. Long-term debt fully repaid during 2021. Net debt position of $1,964,920. restricted_cash includes CMHC restricted cash of $335,626 and restricted cash of $3,502,508. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC ($13,766,267) plus CMHC ($452,263); osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
